title: ARprod's  Security
description: Adds new materials, blocks and tools, all to protect you from those pesky thieves!
body:
Has anyone been stealing all your stuff? Or you just want to add uranium to the game?

Well, introducing

![ARprod's Security](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb6decaf70e9789b631d2d4d0c6e5b1ffa925be7.png)

 Obifium is a unique material crafted by combining flint and obsidian, and it introduces a range of powerful and practical features to enhance gameplay. With obifium, you can create durable blocks, doors, safes, and more.

Obifium Blocks are crafted from four obifium pieces and can be upgraded through tiers, including iron, diamond, netherite, and endite (with ARprod’s Endite mod). Each upgrade strengthens the block, making it highly resistant and ideal for secure construction projects.

Obifium Doors come with a locking mechanism, allowing only the owner to open them. Like the blocks, they can also be upgraded through various tiers for increased security, perfect for safeguarding homes and bases.

The Obifium Safe functions as a lockable chest, offering a secure place to store valuable items. Though it can't be upgraded, it ensures your most important possessions stay protected from theft or tampering in multiplayer environments.

The Obifium Drill adds utility to mining, allowing players to break a 3-block-wide section of materials simultaneously. However, it comes with limitations—it’s imprecise and cannot be enchanted, maintaining balance in the game without making it overpowered.

For defense or mischief, the Obifium Landmine explodes when stepped on by a player but doesn’t break any blocks, making it a tactical tool for traps and PvP scenarios without causing landscape damage.

Finally, Uranium opens the door to a range of fun, radioactive items, allowing players to explore new ways to harness its power. Download the mod to discover all the exciting new possibilities!

**This mod was made for my modpack, so unless all other mods in it are updated this one won't be**

 Versions older than 3.2.0 are on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/arprods-security)
